title: Interactive Orbital Shape Visualizer
creator: Dan McCreary
subject: AP Chemistry
description: MicroSim that renders s, p, and d orbital probability density cross sections with adjustable quantum numbers.

learningObjectives: Identify the shapes of s, p, and d orbitals
Describe how principal quantum number n affects orbital size

keyQuestions: Where do nodes appear in each subshell?
How does increasing n change the probability distribution?
commonMisconceptions: Higher n only changes energy, not spatial extent
assessmentOpportunities: Ask students to identify a mystery orbital shown on screen
